events.event_name: Articles of Confederation adopted by Congress
Treaty of Paris ends Revolutionary War
United States declares war on Britain
Theodore Roosevelt becomes president after McKinley assassination

Senate rejects Treaty of Versailles / League of Nations
FDR inaugurated; New Deal emergency begins
United States declares war on Japan
United Nations Charter signed in San Francisco
Economic Cooperation Act / Marshall Plan signed
U.S. military intervention in Korean War
Brown v. Board of Education decision
U.S. combat troops land in Vietnam
Assassination of Martin Luther King Jr.
Kissinger becomes Secretary of State while NSA
War Powers Resolution enacted over veto
Reagan fires striking air traffic controllers
Violent Crime Control and Law Enforcement Act signed
Authorization for Use of Military Force enacted
Hurricane Katrina landfall and federal response crisis
Emergency Economic Stabilization Act / TARP signed
Federal Reserve announces first large-scale asset purchases
American Recovery and Reinvestment Act signed
Osama bin Laden killed in U.S. raid
Tax Cuts and Jobs Act signed
United States withdraws from Iran nuclear deal
U.S. imposes major tariffs on Chinese goods
U.S. Ukraine aid and sanctions response after Russian invasion
Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization decision
Fiscal Responsibility Act resolves debt-ceiling standoff
Donald Trump convicted in New York criminal case
Marco Rubio sworn in as Secretary of State
JD Vance casts tie-breaking vote for Defense Secretary confirmation
